entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Legume crops used in agricultural systems and subject to genomic improvement.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shifts and uncertainty threatening food security and driving selection pressures.

entities.name: GENOMIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Methods based on genomics used to assess genetic variation and discover adaptive genes.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: INCREASING POPULATION
entities.description: The growth of the human population putting pressure on agricultural systems.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.

entities.name: EVOLUTIONARY ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which species change over time to better survive in their environment.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CHANGES
entities.description: Changes in the environment driven by climate change and other factors.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in gene frequencies within a species, essential for adaptation and crop improvement.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs aimed at enhancing crop traits for better yield, resilience, or quality.

entities.name: ADAPTIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide an advantage to an organism in a specific environment.

entities.name: SELECTION TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to identify and select for desirable genetic traits in crops.
